LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION TO APRIL 3, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MIGUEL DIAZ' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: $25.00 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE GARNISHED FOR PAYMENT TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MIGUEL DIAZ, 415.832.0927, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS IN PART/DENIES IN PART DEFENDANT MIGUEL DIAZ' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS FOLLOWS: $25.00 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE GARNISHED FOR PAYMENT TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: miguel diaz, defendant in pro per; No other appearances.

RULING: the court vacates its tentative ruling and continues pLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption to april 3, 2013 at 9:30 am in department 302. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
